title: CFFC 154: The Thrill on the Hill

posts.author: Tapology
posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: armdrag
posts.body: Predictions: 6 of 7 Pending | Tied for 1st with 36 others Roberts vs. GennrichKegan Gennrich, SUB, R3The Machine Gun is on a roll....just took out 12 fight UFC vet Hubbard easily!!

posts.author: armdrag
posts.body: Predictions: 6 of 7 Pending | Tied for 1st with 36 others unfortunately this fight sounds like it will not happen....Rumor has it Roberts pulled out already???

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 7 of 7 Pending | Tied for 1st with 36 others Jackson vs. LeshukovNikita Leshukov, TKO, R1Leshukov should probably fire his management team if he loses this; idk if his opponent is any good but he at least looks serviceable. I figured they would’ve given Nikita a layup fight, not someone who seems decent. Nikita has a cool highlight reel but I’ve never been impressed with his game outside of the finishes. He is a gasser and has pretty bad tdd. The Starks loss is nothing to scoff at but Nikita had absolutely nothing for him and gasses quickly. Idk this other guy but I asked Nikita will finish him * Edited at 05.03.2026, 12:33 PM ET *

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 7 of 7 Pending | Tied for 1st with 36 others Starks vs. PeaseWilliam Starks, DECStarks is a very solid fighter. He ruined his ufc shot years ago dropping the ball hard against Elizario, but he’s looks great since then. His last fight was a veteran savvy masterclass and he broke a hot prospect down. Starks is pretty good everywhere, it just depends if he shows up: if you ever see the Elizario fight it was just the strangest fight of all time. Pease is a very solid wrestler but that’s all he can do. No striking and no damage dealt; he just lays on top of you. He’s had some awful fights in PFL that were so bad they couldn’t even justify keeping him. I think it will be hard to suppress Starks for 20 minutes. I think he crafts this one up. Would be cool to see him get a ufc/pfl shot, he’s paid his dues and his skillset is really solidCoyle vs. AladiMoshe Aladi, DECMoshe has auraElsony vs. VasquezFathy Elsony, DECElsony had a crazy last fight but I was pretty shocked he won. Tbf I was half watching but I saw him nearly get ko’ed and his face was destroyed afterwards. Idk this other guy but elsony has aura
